Examples

Sample Snippet

FindSRByWKID(string, int, int, bool, bool)

Defines an SR based upon its well known identifier (WKID) and optionally a WKID for a vertical datum. The resolution and xy tolerances are either computed from the sr horizon or set to defaults. 'authority' is typically either 'EPSG' or 'Esri'.

virtual ISpatialReference FindSRByWKID(string authority, int wkid, int WKID_Z, bool bDefaultXYResolution, bool bDefaultXYTolerance)

Parameters

authority string
wkid int
WKID_Z int
bDefaultXYResolution bool
bDefaultXYTolerance bool

Returns

ISpatialReference

Examples

Sample Snippet

FindSRByWKT(string, string, bool, bool)

Defines a spatial reference object based upon its well known text string (WKT) and optionally a WKT for a vertical datum. The resolution and xy tolerances are either computed from the sr horizon or set to defaults. The output sr is always high precision.

virtual ISpatialReference FindSRByWKT(string wkt, string WKT_Z, bool bDefaultXYResolution, bool bDefaultXYTolerance)

Parameters

wkt string
WKT_Z string
bDefaultXYResolution bool
bDefaultXYTolerance bool

Returns

ISpatialReference

Examples

Sample Snippet

FindUnitsByWKID(string, int)

Defines a unit object based upon its well known identified (WKID). 'authority' is typically either 'EPSG' or 'Esri'.

virtual IUnit FindUnitsByWKID(string authority, int wkid)

Parameters

authority string
wkid int

Returns

IUnit

Examples

Sample Snippet

FindUnitsByWKT(string)

Defines a unit object based upon its well known text string.

virtual IUnit FindUnitsByWKT(string wkt)

Parameters

wkt string

Returns

IUnit
